purpose: Pairwise preference data for calibrating LifePilot POI ranking weights.

family_activity_amusement_over_low_fit.name: family_activity_amusement_over_low_fit
family_activity_amusement_over_low_fit.rationale: 亲子游乐/儿童友好活动应优先于健身、运动、酒吧等低适配活动。

family_activity_hands_on_over_movie_mall.name: family_activity_hands_on_over_movie_mall
family_activity_hands_on_over_movie_mall.rationale: 亲子明说手作时，应优先可参与体验，不应被电影或泛商场替代。

family_restaurant_light_over_heavy.name: family_restaurant_light_over_heavy
family_restaurant_light_over_heavy.rationale: 家庭清淡餐要优先正餐和低负担，不应被重口味或低质连锁替代。

family_restaurant_low_queue_over_queue_r.name: family_restaurant_low_queue_over_queue_risk
family_restaurant_low_queue_over_queue_r.rationale: 用户反馈少排队后，家庭餐厅应优先低排队风险候选，不应继续选择静态排队风险高的点。

family_restaurant_buffet_over_snack.name: family_restaurant_buffet_over_snack
family_restaurant_buffet_over_snack.rationale: 家庭明说自助餐时，自助/放题语义必须优先于小吃、饮品或普通简餐。

date_activity_hands_on_over_low_fit.name: date_activity_hands_on_over_low_fit
date_activity_hands_on_over_low_fit.rationale: 约会手作要优先参与感和轻仪式感，避免强社交或运动类低适配活动。

date_activity_walk_over_movie_when_walk.name: date_activity_walk_over_movie_when_walk
date_activity_walk_over_movie_when_walk.rationale: 约会明说附近散步时，应优先步道/湖边/公园，不应用电影或咖啡替代。

date_restaurant_quality_over_casual.name: date_restaurant_quality_over_casual
date_restaurant_quality_over_casual.rationale: 约会/纪念日餐厅要优先有正餐属性和氛围感，避免小吃或咖啡凑数。

date_japanese_over_casual_japanese.name: date_japanese_over_casual_japanese
date_japanese_over_casual_japanese.rationale: 明说日料时，正式日料/居酒屋应优于咖啡、甜品和日式快餐。

date_western_over_drink.name: date_western_over_drink
date_western_over_drink.rationale: 明说西餐/牛排时，餐厅槽必须是西餐正餐，不应落到饮品甜品。

date_lamb_bbq_over_casual.name: date_lamb_bbq_over_casual
date_lamb_bbq_over_casual.rationale: 明说烤羊排/烤肉时，应命中羊肉或烤制正餐，不应被咖啡、小吃替代。

date_hotpot_over_coffee.name: date_hotpot_over_coffee
date_hotpot_over_coffee.rationale: 明说火锅时，餐厅槽必须命中火锅，不应被茶饮甜品替代。

date_light_meal_over_heavy.name: date_light_meal_over_heavy
date_light_meal_over_heavy.rationale: 清淡/减脂晚饭要优先低负担正餐，避开火锅、烤肉和麻辣重口味。

friend_activity_board_game_over_generic.name: friend_activity_board_game_over_generic
friend_activity_board_game_over_generic.rationale: 朋友局明说桌游聊天，活动槽应优先桌游/棋牌类可坐聊空间。

friend_activity_karaoke_over_generic.name: friend_activity_karaoke_over_generic
friend_activity_karaoke_over_generic.rationale: 朋友局明说唱K/KTV时，活动槽必须优先 KTV，不应用影院、咖啡或泛娱乐替代。

friend_activity_low_queue_over_queue_ris.name: friend_activity_low_queue_over_queue_risk
friend_activity_low_queue_over_queue_ris.rationale: 用户反馈排队问题后，朋友局活动应优先低排队风险的室内/可聊天节点。

friend_post_meal_conversation_over_movie.name: friend_post_meal_conversation_over_movie
friend_post_meal_conversation_over_movie.rationale: 饭后想聊天时，应优先可坐聊或散步节点，不应直接塞电影或酒吧。

friend_restaurant_buffet_over_fast.name: friend_restaurant_buffet_over_fast
friend_restaurant_buffet_over_fast.rationale: 朋友局明说自助餐时，自助/放题应优先于小吃和饮品。

friend_restaurant_bbq_over_snack.name: friend_restaurant_bbq_over_snack
friend_restaurant_bbq_over_snack.rationale: 朋友局明说烤肉/烧烤时，烤制正餐应优先于小吃、快餐和咖啡。

solo_music_over_strong_social.name: solo_music_over_strong_social
solo_music_over_strong_social.rationale: 单人散心想听音乐，优先低压力音乐空间，避免强互动或运动项目。

solo_walk_over_alcohol_when_negated.name: solo_walk_over_alcohol_when_negated
solo_walk_over_alcohol_when_negated.rationale: 单人只想附近走走且不喝酒时，散步/安静停留优先于酒吧。

solo_quiet_coffee_over_low_fit.name: solo_quiet_coffee_over_low_fit
solo_quiet_coffee_over_low_fit.rationale: 单人低压力坐一会儿，安静咖啡/停留点优先于强社交或运动项目。

city_light_activity_showcase_over_low_fi.name: city_light_activity_showcase_over_low_fit
city_light_activity_showcase_over_low_fi.rationale: 招待来访家人要优先有本地识别度、好聊天的节点。

city_light_activity_lake_over_mall_when_.name: city_light_activity_lake_over_mall_when_no_mall
city_light_activity_lake_over_mall_when_.rationale: 招待家人且不想商场时，湖边/公园/步行节点优先于泛商场。

city_light_restaurant_quality_over_fast.name: city_light_restaurant_quality_over_fast
city_light_restaurant_quality_over_fast.rationale: 招待家人吃饭要体面但不端着，不能用快餐/饮品替代。

tail_conversation_walk_over_low_fit.name: tail_conversation_walk_over_low_fit
tail_conversation_walk_over_low_fit.rationale: 收尾节点应服务聊天、散步或轻停留，不应变成强社交或酒精场景。

tail_rain_safe_over_exposed_walk_when_we.name: tail_rain_safe_over_exposed_walk_when_weather_risky
tail_rain_safe_over_exposed_walk_when_we.rationale: 天气风险较高时，收尾节点应优先室内/雨天友好停留点，而不是裸露步道。
